title: PhD in Information Technology (DEIB) — Responsible AI / Computational Social Science
funding: Funded (PoliMi PhD scholarship, ~€19k/yr stipend + tuition waived)

notes: NO formal posting URL — Pierri invites prospective students via direct email. Standard PoliMi PhD call (41st cycle 3rd additional call 2025-26) is the expected pathway. Email Pierri FIRST to confirm he'll back an application before drafting the Elaborato di Ricerca.
